2603.20181.title: Improving Generalization on Cybersecurity Tasks with Multi-Modal Contrastive Learning
2603.20181.paper_summary: The use of ML in cybersecurity has long been impaired by generalization issues: Models that work well in controlled scenarios fail to maintain performance in production. The root cause often lies in ML algorithms learning superficial patterns (shortcuts) rather than underlying cybersecurity concepts. We investigate contrastive multi-modal learning as a first step towards improving ML performance in cybersecurity tasks. We aim at transferring knowledge from data-rich modalities, such as text, to data-scarce modalities, such as payloads. We set up a case study on threat classification and propose a two-stage multi-modal contrastive learning framework that uses textual vulnerability descriptions to guide payload classification. First, we construct a semantically meaningful embedding space using contrastive learning on descriptions. Then, we align payloads to this space, transferring knowledge from text to payloads. We evaluate the approach on a large-scale private dataset and a synthetic benchmark built from public CVE descriptions and LLM-generated payloads. The methodology appears to reduce shortcut learning over baselines on both benchmarks. We release our synthetic benchmark and source code as open source.
2603.20181.paper_summary_zh: 使用機器學習（ML）在網絡安全中的應用長期受到泛化問題的影響：在受控場景中表現良好的模型在生產環境中無法維持性能。根本原因通常在於機器學習算法學習了表面的模式（捷徑），而非潛在的網絡安全概念。我們調查對比多模態學習，作為改善機器學習在網絡安全任務中性能的第一步。我們的目標是將知識從數據豐富的模態（如文本）轉移到數據稀缺的模態（如有效載荷）。我們設立了一個關於威脅分類的案例研究，並提出了一個兩階段的多模態對比學習框架，利用文本漏洞描述來指導有效載荷分類。首先，我們使用對比學習在描述上構建一個語義上有意義的嵌入空間。然後，我們將有效載荷對齊到這個空間，將知識從文本轉移到有效載荷。我們在一個大規模的私有數據集和一個基於公共CVE描述及LLM生成的有效載荷構建的合成基準上評估了這種方法。該方法似乎在兩個基準上減少了捷徑學習的情況。我們將合成基準和源代碼作為開源釋出。
2603.20181.author: Jianan Huang et.al.
2603.20181.authors: Jianan Huang, Rodolfo V. Valentim, Luca Vassio, Matteo Boffa, Marco Mellia, Idilio Drago, Dario Rossi
